name: People don't understand shader cache stuttering and compilation
snippet: A lot more people are starting to become aware of Unreal 4's DX12 shader compilation stutters, but they don't understand what they are, why they happen.

name: Pre-compiled shader cache cleaned by nvidia driver, causing stutter
snippet: When launching the game again, the existing shader were deleted by nvidia driver due to exceeding driver's openGL/vulkan shader cache size limit.
